title: HR1 4BJ, Freemans of Newent Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/YP3221SG/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Freemans of Newent Limited Installation name: Shucknall Farm Permit number: EPR/YP3221SG/A001  "
